title: briza hackelii
intro: Briza hackelii, also known as the blue oat grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Briza hackelii include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Briza hackelii can be prepared as an infusion or tea by steeping the dried flowers and leaves in hot water, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
